name: Senate-Control-Alert@murphyforflorida.com
subject: we're going to make this worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2379/738133e4/34479b0b/7f8211a3/2577425668/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160318?refcode=pme160318_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

This has been a veryyyyyy bad week for Marco Rubio.

And we're about to make it worse.

Rubio abandoned his Senate seat to run for president. He lost. Now his seat is up for grabs. [_**We need to seize this chance to elect Patrick and turn the Senate blue. Give $5 or $10 right now >>**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2379/738133e4/34479b0b/7f8211a3/2577425668/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160318?refcode=pme160318_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

We've never had an opportunity to flip the Senate like we have in this moment. We can't let this slip through our fingers.

[_**Do what you can right now to help us win back the Senate >>**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2379/738133e4/34479b0b/7f8211a3/2577425668/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160318?refcode=pme160318_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thanks,

Team Murphy

name: Rand Paul
subject: Here's your bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

Do you have happen to have a spare $159,034
laying around?

Perhaps it's hiding under a couch cushion
somewhere?

As an American taxpayer, that's your share of
our ballooning $19 TRILLION national debt.

Even with our debt increasing every day,
politicians in BOTH parties tell you there's nowhere to cut!

As one of the few fiscal conservatives in the
U.S. Senate, I've made it my mission to ensure the American
people understand how their taxpayer dollars are being wasted.

As a result, I'm being targeted by big
spending Democrats in 2016. But I'm not backing down.

In fact, earlier this week, I proposed
simple, common-sense cuts from my Waste Report to the Senate
Budget Committee.

Now I'm asking you to sign your name urging
them to do so, and make your most generous contribution of $50,
$25 or even $10 right away.

Anyone with a shred of common-sense
understands our federal government wastes money.

Both parties are to blame.

Should the American people really be paying
$6 million to promote tourism in Albania?

Or nearly a half-a-million dollars for
climate change video games?

Or $15.6 million for foreign students'
college tuition?

Or $43 million for a gas station in
Afghanistan?

Patriot, politicians in Washington, D.C.
today have gotten it in their heads that your money is theirs,
and they can spend it however they want.

In the process, they're taxing and spending
this country into oblivion.

I don't have a spare $159,034 laying around
to pay for it all.

If you don't either, we must stop this
madness.

Please take action right way by urging the
Senate Budget Committee to include my cuts in 2017 Budget.

And if possible, please agree to a generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away to help me keep
fighting for you.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

GIVE $10 TODAY >>

GIVE $25 TODAY >>

GIVE $50 TODAY >>

GIVE $100 TODAY >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Cup of Joe: March 19, 2016
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Joe Sestak
body:
www.JoeSestak.com
CUP OF JOE

March 19th, 2016
Newsletter

Good morning! I wanted to provide an update about what I've been up to and where I've traveled. Thanks so much for reading, I truly appreciate your support!

WATCH: Our First TV Ad

On Wednesday, our first TV ad began airing across PA. The ad uses a common military term for having someone's back - "I've got your six" - to explain why I want to serve: to have people's six.

Click the video below to watch the ad, and then help us keep it on air by contributing through the button at the end of this email!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q2s8lm3StTs

Philadelphia Gay News

PGN: Do you support the Equality Act, and how would you advance it?

JS: Yes. I fought for the previous ENDA [Employment Non-Discrimination Act]. Let me just tell you how it works in the military. There was a study done [to determine] whether gays would impact us under "Don't Ask, Don't Tell." The assessment came out that, no, it would have no impact on operation readiness. That's how I feel about why we need to make sure we have a federal nondiscrimination law. It isn't just that you want equality. It's that we want the best of everybody. Therefore, to have something like "Don't Ask, Don't Tell" or the failure to have an antidiscrimination law, it's harmful to the common effort. As I advance these arguments, I like to say the common mission benefits by having the best of the best.

PGN: How would you strengthen hate-crime reporting for crimes motivated by anti-LGBT bias?

JS: We don't have [a hate-crime law] at the state level. It's a big, open loophole that people can dive right through despite federal law. We need here in Pennsylvania not just to have a hate-crime bill. We also need to have nondiscrimination laws.

PGN: What would you do to prevent violence against LGBT people?

JS: Leadership is about galvanizing people toward an idea. I think we're in a fight for the character of America right now. Yes, we need laws that advance individual opportunity like antidiscrimination laws for the LGBT community. But you need leadership to galvanize the people so they know it's the right thing to do. A servant leader is what you're supposed to be. We don't have the leaders, in my belief, that are out there warring upon the fact that this is what we stand for and this is good for people to have a hate-crime bill.

PGN: What could be done to strengthen anti-bullying programs in public schools?

JS: Do you need anti-bullying laws? Damn right, you do. Expect what you inspect is what you learn in the military. You should have standards for that inspection. Let's have the standards, and let's do the inspection and then make it transparent in the reports. When you reveal something, all of a sudden people as the public under a leader say, "Let's fix that." That's how you do it; not just for the LGBT community, but for everyone. This is the transformative age for kids.

PGN: Do you support open transgender service in the military?

JS: Absolutely.

PGN: Do you think a legislative solution is needed to say you can't turn away a transgender person who wants to serve openly?

JS: If that's what it takes, if the service isn't doing it on its own, absolutely.

PGN: Is there anything you'd like to do for stronger outreach about HIV/AIDS to minority communities?

JS: I've spoken to African-American pastors. The best thing we can do is to have the African-American leadership and ministries speaking out even more on this. They're very open. They'll stop a service and someone will get up. They'll have someone there from an AIDS organization and the gentleman will make his comments and say he'll be in the back. We need to do more of that. Another end of HIV that I'd like to work on: We're going to have to really start taking care of seniors. Those in the early '80s when the epidemic really started breaking out, all of a sudden are going into their 70s and 80s. If you go to ActionAIDS, the gentleman in charge will walk you through this wonderful effort of how they're changing to help all senior people, not just in the gay community.

PGN: What do you see as the next legislative priority for the LGBT community in the post-marriage moment?

JS: The real step is to ensure this issue of equality overall with nondiscrimination in public accommodations and housing. I think the Affordable Care Act did a good job. But I think you have to watch it to ensure that the LGBT community has equal access.

PGN: Why should an LGBT voter cast a ballot for you?

JS: I think an LGBT voter is like any other American. I would like to have their support because I truly do believe in equality. We are better as a country if all hands are on deck. And hold me accountable. As my record has shown, I've stayed the course no matter what tough seas are out there.

Joe Sestak is a former Congressman from the Seventh District and a U.S. Navy Three-Star Admiral.

Pat Toomey Must Stop his Judicial Obstructionism

https://twitter.com/JoeSestak

Five weeks before the President even announced Judge Merrick Garland as his nominee, Pat Toomey announced his refusal to consider any nominee at all, because, in Toomey's words, a vacancy on the Supreme Court is "not that big a deal."

Justice for the people is a big deal, and Pennsylvanians deserve a Senator who believes, as our founder William Penn said, that "to delay justice is injustice."

Speaking at the 63rd National Women's Conference

I had the honor of speaking at the 63rd National Women's Conference at the Church of the Lord Jesus Christ of the Apostolic Faith in Philadelphia. Bishop Omega asked that I speak to the theme of the conference, "transforming yourself," and you can watch my speech by clicking the video below:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1MX71S7g97g

Thanks for reading -- and please click the "contribute" button to keep our momentum going.

JoeFacebook: www.facebook.com/joesestak
Twitter: twitter.com/JoeSestak
www.joesestak.com

Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | http://action.joesestak.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

Paid for by Friends of Joe Sestak

name: Kevin Bingle
subject: Not a fundraising email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America
body:
Peter, we wanted to give you a few quick updates:

1. WATCH: Gov. John Kasich will
appear on four Sunday shows and we encourage you to tune in or
record them to hear an update about the campaign.

FOX - Fox News Sunday
(find local listing)

CNN - State of the Union
(9AM & Noon EST)

CBS - Face The Nation
(find local listing)

NBC - Meet the Press
(find local listing)

2. THE PLAN: We expect a strong
finish in the Utah Caucus on Tuesday and then the next state will
be Wisconsin on April 5th.

With your ongoing support, not
only will we deny Trump the nomination, but we'll have momentum
headed into the Republican Convention to rally the support needed
to nominate Gov. Kasich.

3. HOW WE'LL WIN: Like our big
win in Ohio and strong finishes in New Hampshire, Michigan,
Massachusetts and Vermont, most of the remaining states strongly
favor a candidate with a proven record like John Kasich. It's
critical that we keep securing delegates and with your help, we
will.

4. WHY WE'LL WIN: Gov. John
Kasich is the only Republican candidate who can defeat Hillary
Clinton this fall and that's why we're confident that we'll
secure the nomination at the convention. It's also why Ted Cruz
is trying so hard to push us out of the race.

Politico released a survey where
45% of respondents said that Gov. Kasich is the best Republican
candidate to go on and defeat Hillary Clinton this fall,
finishing 12-points ahead of Cruz and a whopping 23-points ahead
of Trump!

And don't forget how unpopular
Trump/Cruz are!

Peter, we have a path to
victory and our campaign is growing stronger every day. Help grow
our momentum!

Onward to victory,

Kevin Bingle
Digital Director
JohnKasich.com

P.S. In case you haven't yet
signed up to volunteer or want to make a generous contribution,
use the buttons below. Thanks!

Paid for by Kasich for America
JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Tom Russell, RussFeingold.com
subject: FWD: Supreme Court pick
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Don't let Senate Republicans continue to dig their heels in. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf41cb/1c469400/5951e47/3519826/3482266498/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/SCOTUSnom?utm_source=ema_2016-03-19_scotus2_fwd-rj&source=ema_2016-03-19_scotus2_fwd-rj&utm_campaign=scotus2_fwd-rj&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- On Wednesday, President Obama announced his nominee to the Supreme Court: Judge Merrick Garland. Ron Johnson immediately sent a fundraising email to his supporters, whining about the president's pick and promising to _not_ do his job. Check it out below. **[This isn't a game, Senator Johnson. It's time to do your job --_now_ \-- and give Judge Merrick Garland fair consideration.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf41cb/1c469400/5951e47/3519826/3482266498/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/SCOTUSnom?utm_source=ema_2016-03-19_scotus2_fwd-rj&source=ema_2016-03-19_scotus2_fwd-rj&utm_campaign=scotus2_fwd-rj&utm_medium=ema")** In the email, Johnson tells his supporters, "The Republican majority in the Senate will not allow the Supreme Court to flip." I think he may just have the most partisan, cynical record in America on this issue! He's happy to support Mitch McConnell and the Koch brothers in their obstruction. He's happy to put party ahead of country in order to raise money and salvage his reelection. **But the one thing Senator Johnson is NOT happy to do? His job.** [**Enough is enough. The president has done his job -- now, it's the Senate's turn. Join Russ in calling on Ron Johnson to do his job and give Judge Merrick fair consideration.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf41cb/1c469400/5951e47/3519826/3482266498/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/SCOTUSnom?utm_source=ema_2016-03-19_scotus2_fwd-rj&source=ema_2016-03-19_scotus2_fwd-rj&utm_campaign=scotus2_fwd-rj&utm_medium=ema") Thank you for standing with Russ today. Together, we'll make sure to hold Senator Johnson and his GOP colleagues accountable. Tom Russell
Campaign Manager | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf41cb/1c469400/5951e47/3519826/3482266498/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/SCOTUSnom?utm_source=ema_2016-03-19_scotus2_fwd-rj&source=ema_2016-03-19_scotus2_fwd-rj&utm_campaign=scotus2_fwd-rj&utm_medium=ema")
---

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Team RonJon
Date: Wed, Mar 16, 2016
Subject: Supreme Court pick
Friend,
_"The**Republican majority** in the **Senate will not allow the Supreme Court to flip**."_
_\- Ron Johnson_

President Obama has made his choice. And no surprise, he's offering up another liberal judge to sit on the Supreme Court. **_We need your donation of at least $25 today to stop him._**

In 2014, WE made our choice, and elected a Republican majority in the Senate. That check and balance is more important than ever as Obama attempts to re-shape the Supreme Court for a generation. **_Show your opposition to President Obama's power grab with a donation today._**

Our only chance at rejecting this choice and being able to hold the line in the Senate is if you **_step up today and donate $25 so that Senate conservatives can fight back._**

Thank you so much for your ongoing support,

Team RonJon

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: Don't let Senate Republicans continue to dig their heels in. | "" Friend -- On Wednesday, President Obama announced his nominee to the Supreme Court: Judge Merrick Garland. Ron Johnson immediately sent a fundraising email to his supporters, whining about the president's pick and promising to not do his job. Check it out below. "" In the email, Johnson tells his supporters, "The Republican majority in the Senate will not allow the Supreme Court to flip." I think he may just have the most partisan, cynical record in America on this issue! He's happy to support Mitch McConnell and the Koch brothers in their obstruction. He's happy to put party ahead of country in order to raise money and salvage his reelection. But the one thing Senator Johnson is NOT happy to do? His job. "" Thank you for standing with Russ today. Together, we'll make sure to hold Senator Johnson and his GOP colleagues accountable. Tom Russell Campaign Manager | "" \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Team RonJon Date: Wed, Mar 16, 2016 Subject: Supreme Court pick Friend, "TheRepublican majority in the Senate will not allow the Supreme Court to flip." \- Ron Johnson President Obama has made his choice. And no surprise, he's offering up another liberal judge to sit on the Supreme Court. We need your donation of at least $25 today to stop him. In 2014, WE made our choice, and elected a Republican majority in the Senate. That check and balance is more important than ever as Obama attempts to re-shape the Supreme Court for a generation. Show your opposition to President Obama's power grab with a donation today. Our only chance at rejecting this choice and being able to hold the line in the Senate is if you step up today and donate $25 so that Senate conservatives can fight back. Thank you so much for your ongoing support, Team RonJon

name: Trump-Alert@murphyforflorida.com
subject: Trump's newest supporter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2376/738133e4/347b1d0d/7f82111a/97212618/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160318_b?refcode=pme160319&recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
Friend -- Let's review what Gov. Rick Scott has been up to:
* _**LAST WEEK:**_ He was KICKED OFF _Morning Joe_ after refusing to answer the _MSNBC_ host's questions about Donald Trump's negative characterizations of Muslim Americans.

* _**THIS WEEK:**_ Scott turned around and endorsed Trump the day after he won Florida's primary in a landslide!

Floridians are tired of this kind of political opportunism. Rick Scott has been a disaster for our state, just as Donald Trump would be a disaster for our country.

It's time we put Democrats back in charge. [**Will you pitch in now so we can win Florida and turn the Senate blue?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2376/738133e4/347b1d0d/7f82111a/97212618/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160318_b?refcode=pme160319&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thanks,

Team Murphy

Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjUwMjE2MTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzMjc5MjYxS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjUwMjE2MTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzMjc5MjYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)! name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Real talk
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter -
At every turn, the establishment pundits have written us off, shut us out, and tried to write our movement's obituary.
We shouldn't be surprised that, once again, they're piling on to say game over. But, with more than 50 percent of the delegates still up for grabs, we're just at half time.
**Here's the truth: there has never been a campaign better positioned for the long haul than this one, for two critical reasons:**
1\. Our grassroots, small-dollar fundraising machine powered by you, our supporters.
2\. Our unprecedented voter contact machine powered by you, our volunteers.
Simply put, your donations are what allow us to keep the lights on and keep spreading Bernie's message - even when the corporate media sanctimoniously declares that it's time for us to call it quits - and your participation as volunteers is what's allowed us to win nine states so far and send shockwaves through the political establishment.
You've heard a lot about our historic number of small-dollar donors and donations, which is incredible. But what all of you have been doing as volunteers is no less extraordinary:
> • Over 7,600 individual Bernie volunteers have hosted their own voter contact events calling voters and knocking on doors.
> • In the past week alone there were over 1,600 phone bank events held by Bernie volunteers.
> • Since January, Bernie volunteers have made over 38 million calls to voters in key states.
Nothing like this has ever happened before in American politics, with this many volunteers stepping up to do the heavy lifting. **And it's working.** In state after state, your calls and door knocks are what's moving the needle.
As we move into late March, we're entering a pivotal stage of the campaign. The primary calendar is shifting in our favor, with many states coming up where we can win - or win big. But to make up critical ground and take this all the way to November, we're going to need each and every one of you to volunteer if you haven't already, or double down and volunteer again if you're already involved.
**Can you sign up to attend a voter contact event near you?**
**[Phone Banking to March 22nd States + schmoozing:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4g4f4)
Sunday, March 20th at 2:00 pm EDT in McLean **
**[Phone banking for Bernie - College Park, MD:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4g8zw)
Monday, March 21st at 6:00 pm EDT in College Park **
**[Phonebank for Bernie!:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4gwrb)
Tuesday, March 22nd at 5:00 pm EDT in Silver Spring **
**[Phone Bank Party:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4gw44)
Wednesday, March 23rd at 6:00 pm EDT in Silver Spring **
**[Phone banking for Bernie - College Park, MD:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4g8zf)
Thursday, March 24th at 6:00 pm EDT in College Park **
**You can also[make calls from home with the Bernie Dialer](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/phonebank/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/phonebank/"), or [check our map](http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&sort=time&f%5B%5D=campaign-office&f%5B%5D=bernie-event&f%5B%5D=official-event&f%5B%5D=phonebank&f%5B%5D=gotv&f%5B%5D=canvassing&f%5B%5D=ballot-access&f%5B%5D=carpool&f%5B%5D=register-voters&f%5B%5D=barnstorm&f%5B%5D=other "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&sort=time&f%5B%5D=campaign-office&f%5B%5D=bernie-event&f%5B%5D=official-event&f%5B%5D=phonebank&f%5B%5D=gotv&f%5B%5D=canvassing&f%5B%5D=ballot-access&f%5B%5D=carpool&f%5B%5D=register-voters&f%5B%5D=barnstorm&f%5B%5D=other") for other events happening near you.**
Nothing worth fighting for will be easy. This campaign has always been a long shot, and it's indisputable that this past Tuesday our path to the nomination narrowed a bit.
**But let's be clear about one thing: there is absolutely still a path to victory. And this movement - which has already reshaped American politics - is not about to give up with 24 states still left to go.**
The pundits can't stop our campaign. They couldn't stop it when they ignored us for months before Iowa and wrote us off as a protest campaign. And they can't stop us now. We're not giving up, and we know you won't either. There's too much at stake to leave this political revolution unfinished.
It's an honor to be with you in this movement.
In solidarity,
Claire Sandberg
Bernie 2016

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160319sweep "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160319sweep")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
